purpose: Defines the deviation reporting protocol for worker agents. A deviation is anything the worker did that was not explicitly specified in its dispatch prompt, classified into CRITICAL (interface/contract change affecting downstream tasks), MODERATE (different approach but same outcome), or MINOR (cosmetic, no functional impact). Workers must report deviations immediately to both deviations[] and a level:'deviation' log entry.
gotchas: Under-reporting is worse than over-reporting -- when in doubt, report it
CRITICAL deviations may force the master to re-plan downstream tasks before dispatching them
Deviation must be added to BOTH deviations[] and logs[] (level:'deviation') -- one without the other is incomplete
patterns: Immediate (not end-of-task) deviation reporting for live dashboard visibility
conventions: Deviation descriptions answer: what happened, why, and what the impact is
Resolution priority for ambiguity: dispatch prompt -> CLAUDE.md -> conservative choice -> document as deviation
